german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Nearly half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PM Roles Dominate, Creating Significant Imbalance
pm_type.subtitle: A substantial gap exists between Core PM and other roles, highlighting concentration in product management.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 34% of the workforce, indicating a mixed seniority landscape.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce remains on-site, highlighting limited flexibility in work arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce
ai.subtitle: Only 28% of roles prioritize AI as a core responsibility, indicating limited mainstream adoption.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Diversity and Balance
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
